comment.body: Took a 5920 call one minute into market open because the flows of calls outpaced the puts. Heightened gamma level was 5920 at the open. Rode it till ES hit 5915 in the first 5-10 minutes , and took profit for a scalp. Called it a day after that. One of the best things Alma reminded me of since day 1 in this substack is take what you need and go live your life the rest of the day. Don’t try to overtrade and be too greedy.
